title: stachys circinata subsp. numidica
intro: Stachys circinata subsp. numidica, also known as Numidian Stachys, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as indigestion and bloating, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Numidian Stachys include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues like coughs and colds, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although its efficacy and safety may require further scientific validation.
